description: Labubu the Atlantis Fairy (LABUBU) is the FIRST fairy-themed memecoin on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — spreading laughter, light, and luck across the FairyVerse. Rug-proof under the unique AI contract, Proof of Light, and QuantumLock protection, LABUBU turns every holder and trader into a source of joy, proving that blockchain can be magical, beautiful, and full of wonder — forever in Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Labubu the Atlantis Fairy
